semanticEvent.description: A close-up of a pedestrian signal showing a 'don't walk' hand symbol.
A green traffic sign indicating directions to Broadway and 5th Avenue.
A brief glimpse of an information display board.
A close-up shot of a digital subway arrival timer.
A quick transition to a screen showing transit route information.
Another rapid cut showing a different transit display.
A brief look at a walking path or street intersection marker.
A pedestrian signal changing to the walking figure icon.
The green traffic light is shown, signaled by the turn instruction signage.
A close-up of the walking pedestrian sign, allowing movement in the city.
